works.title: Style is Wild
works.description: An abstract composition based on the hidden structures between graffiti letters, movement and urban rhythm.
works.alt: Hize colorful abstract graffiti artwork on canvas

works.title: Canvas Composition No. 1
works.description: A studio work translating graffiti rhythm, colour and letter construction into a contemporary abstract composition.
works.alt: Hize abstract painting inspired by graffiti letter structures

works.title: Get High
works.description: A canvas work connecting traditional graffiti energy with layered abstract colour fields.
works.alt: Hize abstract graffiti canvas with colorful letter fragments

works.title: Conexion
works.description: A composition built from connections between letter fragments, movement and abstract urban structure.
works.alt: Hize abstract graffiti canvas with pastel color movement

works.title: Conexion No. 3
works.description: A canvas work exploring balance, kinetic gesture and the visual memory of graffiti writing.
works.alt: Hize colorful abstract graffiti artwork on canvas

works.title: Expo Bohemia Negro
works.description: A panoramic studio piece with layered graffiti references, contrast and abstract rhythm.
works.alt: Hize abstract graffiti canvas with black background and colorful shapes

works.title: Osaka Writing
works.description: An international graffiti work from Hize's archive, connected to his broader practice in urban visual culture.
works.alt: Hize graffiti artwork in Osaka with abstract letter structure

works.title: Sharjah Writing
works.description: A graffiti archive piece showing the structural origin of Hize's abstract studio language.
works.alt: Hize graffiti piece in Sharjah with dynamic letter forms

works.title: Torreblanca Mural
works.technique: Acrylic and spray paint on wall
works.description: A large-scale mural translating graffiti roots into colour, movement and architectural presence.
works.alt: Hize mural in Spain combining graffiti and abstract shapes

works.title: Digital Graffiti Session
works.description: A live digital extension of graffiti where movement, gesture and technology become visual expression.
works.alt: Hize VR art performance creating digital graffiti in real time
